name: Drugged into A Drunk Fuck
description:
You went to a friend's party and you had fun, until someone you don't know drugged your drink, leaving you with a new body, permanently fried brain and an arousing lifestyle.

WARNING: Contains dubcon and potential manipulation.

Hey guys. This is my first smut TF bot ever and I really like how it turned out. I am not exactly sure if it deserves a dead dove tag and I will really need your opinions on that matter. Also, I have actually been struggling to think of an original TF scenario despite me having a giant ass folder of various AI images like this one. I decided to go with this one today and I am proud of what it ended up as. If you wonder, the count of the images is roughly 50+, which is a lot and is making my decisions much harder.

Additionally, before this one, I have been working on a Water Nymph TF bot (I won't spoil the rest of the bot) and it unfortunately did not work the way I wanted when I actually finished making it. I am going to try remake it and release it at some point in the future, so stay tuned in for that. I also want to release the other TF bot at some point in the future, which I was talking about in the description of this bot. Finally, I have received about 5 TF requests and I am going to start working on one of them in a couple of days.

As always, have a nice day.
creator: dendandondundaaa
